meta.title: HOLMETA
meta.description: Holmeta helps heavy screen users reduce eye strain and keep focus.

home.title: Protect your eyes. Keep your focus.
home.subtitle: Holmeta is a browser extension for people who spend hours on screens. Use light filters, deep work sessions, and gentle reminders to reduce strain and stay on task.

demo.summary: See filter toggle, focus timer, and reminder prompts in one quick walkthrough.
demo.unsupported: Your browser does not support the demo video.

trust.kicker: BUILT FOR PEOPLE WHO LIVE IN TABS

items.title: Reduce eye strain
items.body: Switch on browser light filters that make late work easier on your eyes.

items.title: Stay in deep work
items.body: Run focus sessions that reduce interruptions and help you keep momentum.

items.title: Remember to reset
items.body: Get subtle reminders for breaks, blinking, posture, and hydration.

how.title: How Holmeta works
steps: Turn on filters, focus mode, and reminders in under a minute
how.body: No complicated setup. No account maze. Just install, activate, and go.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
bullets: Focus timer and deep work mode
Break, blink, posture, and hydration reminders
pricing.foot: No ads. No data-selling business model. Just a focused utility that helps you work better.

privacy.title: Built to stay in your browser
privacy.body: Holmeta runs where you work: inside the browser. Sensitive controls stay local. Billing only unlocks premium features.

items.a: Holmeta is a focused utility with ongoing updates, privacy-first local controls, and no ad-based business model. At $2/month, it’s designed to be a small tool that makes your browser easier on your eyes and attention.
Holmeta v1 is browser-only by design.
You get access to Premium features for 3 days. Cancel anytime.
Billing and license records needed to unlock Premium. Core browsing controls run locally in your extension.
Chromium browsers now. Expand support later as store distribution grows.

pricingPage.subtitle: Localized language. Consistent billing logic. Clear upgrade path.
pricingPage.footer: Displayed currency may be localized. Final charge is shown in Stripe Checkout before confirmation.

dashboard.title: start your 3-day trial
dashboard.body: Keep your flow simple: checkout first, reveal your license on success, then download and activate the extension.
steps: Open /billing/success with your checkout session id.
Reveal and copy your one-time license key.
Download extension and activate premium with your key.

subscribe.title: pick your plan and continue to checkout
subscribe.body: Trial starts in Stripe Checkout. After payment, you land on Billing Success to reveal license and download.

billingSuccess.title: your holmeta license key
billingSuccess.body: Save this key now. You need it to activate Premium inside the extension.
billingSuccess.statusAlreadyRevealed: STATUS: LICENSE ALREADY REVEALED FOR THIS SESSION
activateSteps: Download and load the extension in your browser.
Open extension popup and go to Premium unlock.
Paste license key and click Activate.
Keep this page bookmarked for billing and cancellation access.

download.title: download holmeta extension
download.flowBody: If you have not started checkout yet, begin your 3-day trial first. If you already paid, use your session id or license key below.
download.manualBody: After download: extract zip → open chrome://extensions → enable Developer mode → Load unpacked → select extracted folder containing manifest.json.
download.statusEnter: STATUS: ENTER SESSION ID OR LICENSE TO DOWNLOAD
download.statusNeedInput: STATUS: ENTER CHECKOUT SESSION ID OR LICENSE KEY
download.statusNoEntitlement: STATUS: NO ACTIVE TRIAL OR SUBSCRIPTION FOUND

billingHelp.title: license, cancellation, and refunds
billingHelp.body: Need help after checkout? Use this page to recover your license key, cancel in Stripe, or request a refund review.
cancelSteps: Click Manage Billing to open the Stripe billing portal.
billingHelp.refundBody: Refunds are handled case-by-case. Include your checkout session id and reason so support can review quickly.
billingHelp.subject: HOLMETA REFUND REQUEST
billingHelp.includeBody: session id, purchase date, and a brief issue summary

billingCancel.title: no charge was made
billingCancel.body: When you are ready, restart checkout and begin your 3-day trial.

privacyPage.title: Holmeta Privacy Posture
store: Extension settings and reminder logs are stored locally in your browser by default.
Stripe billing records and license hashes are stored server-side for subscriptions and unlock checks.
Entitlement state (trialing/active/inactive) is stored to unlock paid features.
notStore: No page-content harvesting for ad analytics.
processing: Screen filters and reminder overlays run in-browser.
Camera access is optional and requested only if webcam posture mode is enabled.
Billing, download gating, and license checks are processed through secure server functions.

termsPage.title: Holmeta Terms
scope: Holmeta provides browser-based wellness and focus tooling.
Holmeta is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
Some features require an active subscription.
billing: Yearly billing is also available where offered on the subscribe page.
Trial terms are shown in Stripe Checkout.
You can manage, cancel, or request refund review from billing support and Stripe portal.
acceptable: Do not use the service for unlawful activity.
Do not attempt to abuse billing, license, or entitlement systems.
Use at your own discretion in accordance with browser and platform policies.

statusPage.title: Holmeta Release Status
statusPage.monitoring: MONITORING: ENABLED (FUNCTION LOGS + CLIENT ERROR INGEST)

changelog.summary: Light Filters hardening: dark/light reading now uses safe single-strategy rendering with page-tone fallback clamps to prevent unreadable pages.
Production verification pass: Netlify env check, checkout smoke for monthly_a + yearly, gated download access control, and extension zip sync validation.
GA hardening: gated extension download, no-login license activation flow, and webhook idempotency checks.
Plan simplification: monthly_a + yearly only across checkout, validation, and smoke scripts.
Netlify build pipeline stabilized with extension zip sync and CSS integrity guard.
Homepage structure updated to mission-briefing format with browser-aware download flow.
